_comment: TEMPLATE (FRAMEWORK.md §C11.5). Project-scoped MCP servers = typed connections to external systems (Figma, image-gen, GitHub, a DB, an issue tracker). Place at the repo root as .mcp.json — it is committable/shareable with the team. Secrets come from ${ENV} expansion (never hard-code tokens). Prefer wrapping MCP calls inside a Skill with guardrails over calling them ad-hoc. Replace the placeholders and delete this _comment key.
